pr.title: Record: 11L XSA + EMA + Int6 MLP3x + WD=0.04 (val_bpb: 1.1271)

output.summary: 11-layer muP transformer uses XSA on final layers with EMA averaging plus int6 quantization and SmearGate to tighten generalization and compression.
techniques: Exclusive Self Attention on last four layers to remove self-value bias
Per-step EMA averaging replacing SWA warmdown checkpoints
Int6 mixed quantization with SmearGate and BigramHash embedding stack
